title: St. Patrick's Day at Victory Brewing Kennett Square — March 15
summary: Victory Brewing Kennett Square celebrates St. Patrick's Day on March 15 from noon to 2 PM.
description:
Victory Brewing's Kennett Square taproom celebrates St. Patrick's Day on Sunday, March 15 from noon to 2 PM. It's a low-key afternoon celebration in the heart of Kennett Square's growing food and drink scene.

Kennett Square — the Mushroom Capital of the World — keeps adding reasons to visit downtown. If you're enjoying Victory's tap list this St. Patrick's Day, raise a glass to the community. And if you've got an older parent living in one of Kennett's charming older homes on State Street, make sure their bathroom is safe before you head out.

title: Open Mic Night at Hangry Bear Creamery — March 19
summary: Hangry Bear Creamery in Kennett Square hosts Open Mic Night on March 19 at 6 PM.
description:
Hangry Bear Creamery in Kennett Square hosts Open Mic Night on Thursday, March 19 at 6 PM. Whether you're performing or just watching, it's a fun weeknight outing in downtown Kennett.

Kennett Square's small-town creative energy is one of the best things about living here. Staying in your home as you age — instead of moving to a facility — means you get to keep enjoying nights like this. A safe bathroom is part of what makes aging in place possible.

title: Comedy Night at Hangry Bear After Dark — March 27
summary: Hangry Bear After Dark brings stand-up comedy to Kennett Square on March 27 at 8 PM.
description:
Hangry Bear After Dark presents Comedy Night on Friday, March 27 at 8 PM in Kennett Square. The evening features stand-up comedy in an intimate setting — a growing tradition in Kennett's nightlife scene.

Kennett Square punches above its weight when it comes to things to do. The borough's older homes along State Street and in the surrounding neighborhoods are part of its charm, but many have bathrooms that haven't been updated in decades. If you or someone you know needs grab bars installed, it's a quick and affordable upgrade.
